title: Tango RaaS API Vocabulary
description: Domain vocabulary for the Tango Rewards as a Service (RaaS) API

terms.definition: Rewards as a Service — Tango Card's branded API offering for programmatic reward distribution
Universal Token ID — a unique identifier assigned to each reward item in the Tango catalog, used when placing orders
A platform-level entity representing a business or organization using the RaaS API; identified by a customerIdentifier
A unique string identifier for a customer within the Tango platform
A sub-entity of a customer that holds a balance in a specific currency and is used to fund reward orders
A unique string identifier for an account within the Tango platform
A transaction record representing the purchase and delivery of one or more rewards
The unique reference identifier assigned to an order upon creation
An individual reward delivery record within an order; one order may contain multiple line items
The unique reference identifier for a specific line item within an order
The full directory of available reward products (3,100+) including gift cards, prepaid cards, and charitable donations
A merchant or organization that offers gift cards or rewards within the Tango catalog
A unique identifier string for a brand within the catalog
A multi-brand gift card product allowing recipients to choose from a curated set of brands
A customizable HTML email template (identified by ETID) used for reward delivery notifications
Email Template ID — unique identifier for a digital email template
A transaction that adds funds to an account using a registered credit card
An operation moving balance between accounts within the Tango platform
A notification configuration that triggers when an account balance falls below a defined threshold
The conversion rate between two supported currencies on the Tango platform
A country in which reward products are available for delivery
The format in which a reward is delivered to the recipient (e.g., barcode, link, PIN)
A standardized code explaining the reason for a line item action such as cancellation or freeze
A reversible hold placed on a line item that prevents reward delivery while retaining the order
The re-generation of a reward credential for a line item, producing a new code or link
Retransmit the reward delivery email for an existing order or line item
The integration environment (https://integration-api.tangocard.com/raas/v2) for testing without real transactions
HTTP Basic Authentication using a platform name and API key, the primary authentication mechanism for the RaaS API
A bearer token obtained via OAuth for more secure, token-based API authentication
An HTTP callback configured to receive real-time event notifications (e.g., order fulfillment, line item status changes) from the Tango platform
